payload.title: Connect-driven workspaces: local-origin projects, hub follows the repo
payload.description: Refine how boards come to exist (feedback while validating SCP-232). Model: projects originate from LOCAL workspaces that connect to a hub; the hosted UI is a pure collaboration view (no filesystem-attach, no blank-project creation). And the board must follow the repo via the committed .scope/remote.json pointer + the hub EVEN WHEN the event log (.scope/events/) isn't committed.
